languages.text: {n}Эоганн улыбается сквозь боль.{/n} "Я полагаю, что вы никогда не встречали генетора моего калибра, Вольный Торговец. Данная процедура в высшей степени тривиальна, если соблюдать ритуалы вивисекции и эксплуатационные заветы Омниссии".

{n}Eogunn smiles through the pain.{/n} "I must assume that you have never met a Genetor of my calibre, Rogue Trader. The procedure is utterly trivial, if one observes the rituals of vivisection and the operational covenants of the Omnissiah."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн улыбается сквозь боль.{/n} "Я полагаю, что вы никогда не встречали генетора моего калибра, Вольный Торговец. Данная процедура в высшей степени тривиальна, если соблюдать ритуалы вивисекции и эксплуатационные заветы Омниссии".

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn smiles through the pain.{/n} "I must assume that you have never met a Genetor of my calibre, Rogue Trader. The procedure is utterly trivial, if one observes the rituals of vivisection and the operational covenants of the Omnissiah."

{n}Eogunn smiles through the pain.{/n} "I must assume that you have never met a Genetor of my calibre, Rogue Trader. The procedure is utterly trivial, if one observes the rituals of vivisection and the operational covenants of the Omnissiah."

{n}Eogunn smiles through the pain.{/n} "I must assume that you have never met a Genetor of my calibre, Rogue Trader. The procedure is utterly trivial, if one observes the rituals of vivisection and the operational covenants of the Omnissiah."

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡在痛苦中露出一丝笑意。{/n}“我只能假设，您从未见过我这种级别的基因士，行商浪人。只要遵循活体解剖仪式和欧姆尼赛亚的操作圣约，这一过程不过是微不足道的小事。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles through the pain.{/n} "I must assume that you have never met a Genetor of my calibre, Rogue Trader. The procedure is utterly trivial, if one observes the rituals of vivisection and the operational covenants of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡在痛苦中露出一丝笑意。{/n}“我只能假设，您从未见过我这种级别的基因士，行商浪人。只要遵循活体解剖仪式和欧姆尼赛亚的操作圣约，这一过程不过是微不足道的小事。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn sourit malgré la douleur.{/n} « Je dois en conclure que vous n'avez jamais rencontré de genetor de mon niveau. Cette procédure est parfaitement triviale, lorsqu'on respecte les rituels de vivisection et les préceptes opérationnels de l'Omnimessie. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles through the pain.{/n} "I must assume that you have never met a Genetor of my calibre, Rogue Trader. The procedure is utterly trivial, if one observes the rituals of vivisection and the operational covenants of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn sourit malgré la douleur.{/n} « Je dois en conclure que vous n'avez jamais rencontré de genetor de mon niveau. Cette procédure est parfaitement triviale, lorsqu'on respecte les rituels de vivisection et les préceptes opérationnels de l'Omnimessie. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn sonríe pese al dolor.{/n} «Debo suponer que nunca ha tratado con un genetor de mi calibre, Comerciante Independiente. El procedimiento es absolutamente trivial si uno sigue los rituales de la vivisección y cumple los dictados del Omnissiah».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles through the pain.{/n} "I must assume that you have never met a Genetor of my calibre, Rogue Trader. The procedure is utterly trivial, if one observes the rituals of vivisection and the operational covenants of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn sonríe pese al dolor.{/n} «Debo suponer que nunca ha tratado con un genetor de mi calibre, Comerciante Independiente. El procedimiento es absolutamente trivial si uno sigue los rituales de la vivisección y cumple los dictados del Omnissiah».

languages.text: {n}Eogunn acı içinde gülümsüyor.{/n} "Benim çapımda bir Genetör ile hiç tanışmadığınızı varsayıyorum Hür Tacir. Dirikesim ayinlerine ve Hermesih'in ameliyat ahitlerine uyulursa prosedür oldukça sıradan sayılır."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles through the pain.{/n} "I must assume that you have never met a Genetor of my calibre, Rogue Trader. The procedure is utterly trivial, if one observes the rituals of vivisection and the operational covenants of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn acı içinde gülümsüyor.{/n} "Benim çapımda bir Genetör ile hiç tanışmadığınızı varsayıyorum Hür Tacir. Dirikesim ayinlerine ve Hermesih'in ameliyat ahitlerine uyulursa prosedür oldukça sıradan sayılır."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn lächelt trotz seiner Schmerzen.{/n} "Ich muss annehmen, Ihr habt noch nie einen Genetor meines Kalibers getroffen, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Das Prozedere ist ausgesprochen trivial, wenn man die Rituale der Vivisektion und die operativen Grundsätze des Omnissiah beachtet."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles through the pain.{/n} "I must assume that you have never met a Genetor of my calibre, Rogue Trader. The procedure is utterly trivial, if one observes the rituals of vivisection and the operational covenants of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn lächelt trotz seiner Schmerzen.{/n} "Ich muss annehmen, Ihr habt noch nie einen Genetor meines Kalibers getroffen, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Das Prozedere ist ausgesprochen trivial, wenn man die Rituale der Vivisektion und die operativen Grundsätze des Omnissiah beachtet."

languages.text: {n}エオガンは痛みをこらえて微笑む。{/n}「私ほどの技量のゲネターには、これまでお会いになったことがないものと拝察します、ローグトレーダー。生体解剖の儀式と、オムニッシアの運用聖約を遵守しさえすれば、この手技はまったく取るに足らぬものなのです」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles through the pain.{/n} "I must assume that you have never met a Genetor of my calibre, Rogue Trader. The procedure is utterly trivial, if one observes the rituals of vivisection and the operational covenants of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンは痛みをこらえて微笑む。{/n}「私ほどの技量のゲネターには、これまでお会いになったことがないものと拝察します、ローグトレーダー。生体解剖の儀式と、オムニッシアの運用聖約を遵守しさえすれば、この手技はまったく取るに足らぬものなのです」
